articles.author: Sarah Davis
articles.title: Italy’s Meloni condemns ‘massacre’ at Iranian school, says war ‘outside’ international law - The Hill
articles.description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni on Wednesday condemned the strikes on an Iranian elementary school amid growing discontent from European leaders about ongoing joint U.S.-Israeli military operations in Iran.  In a speech in front of the country’s Parliam…
